rag_rules: Generate AGREE contracts inside annex agree blocks scoped to the owning component declaration
Use assign statements only for implementation-level output bindings with visible output features
generic_rules: Place input assumptions and output guarantees in component type annexes only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
Write output dependency guarantees that relate visible inputs to visible outputs, avoiding implementation-only paths
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use assume/guarantee syntax with labeled expressions and declare constants/equations with proper type annotations
Component implementation annexes are for assign statements and output bindings, not guarantee declarations
anti_patterns: Do not reference identifiers not visible in the current component scope
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE variables without explicit typed model exposure
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
Model fusion and scope preservation rules
